# Newsletter Platform 6-Month Revenue Experiment: Beehiiv Wins by 47%

## Summary

A practitioner ran identical content on Substack, Ghost, and Beehiiv simultaneously for 6 months to measure revenue and growth performance. Beehiiv generated 47% more total revenue than Substack and 78% more than Ghost.

## Revenue results

| Platform | Paid Subscriptions | Sponsored Content | Affiliate/Partner | Total |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Beehiiv | $13,842 | $4,873 | $2,358 | **$21,073** |
| Substack | $14,327 | $0 | $0 | **$14,327** |
| Ghost | $10,127 | $1,715 | $0 | **$11,842** |

**Key insight**: "The diversification of revenue streams on Beehiiv proved to be a significant advantage, accounting for 34% of total revenue that simply wasn't accessible on Substack."

## Revenue per subscriber

- Beehiiv: $7.02 per subscriber
- Substack: $4.78 per subscriber
- Ghost: $3.95 per subscriber

## Growth rates

- Beehiiv subscriber growth rate: ~3x higher than Ghost, 1.5x higher than Substack
- "Clear winner: Beehiiv with a growth rate nearly 3x higher than Ghost and 1.5x higher than Substack"

## Platform scores

| Platform | Overall Score | Best For | Ease of Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| Beehiiv | 8.9/10 | Max revenue + growth | 7/10 |
| Substack | 7.6/10 | Beginners + community | 9/10 |
| Ghost | 7.2/10 | Technical + full control | 5/10 |

## Platform strengths and weaknesses

### Beehiiv
- ✅ Most diverse monetization options
- ✅ Powerful growth and referral tools
- ✅ Superior analytics and segmentation
- ✅ No platform fees on revenue
- ❌ Fewer community engagement features
- ❌ Less established ecosystem than Substack

### Substack
- ✅ Strongest built-in discovery mechanism
- ✅ Simplest setup process (under 2 hours)
- ✅ Strong community tools (comments, threads, notes)
- ❌ Limited monetization (subscriptions only, 10% platform cut)
- ❌ No email automations

### Ghost
- ✅ Most customizable design
- ✅ No platform fees on revenue
- ✅ Superior SEO capabilities
- ✅ Full ownership of platform and data
- ❌ Steepest learning curve (12+ hours setup)
- ❌ Limited built-in growth tools
- ❌ Average read time 23% higher (quality indicator) but growth is slowest

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- This is the strongest quantitative evidence for `guides/03-monetization.md` - use the revenue table as concrete proof.
- The "diversification accounts for 34% of Beehiiv revenue" stat makes the multi-stream monetization argument.
- The Substack $14,327 paid subscription revenue vs Beehiiv $13,842 is close - Substack's discovery actually drives more paid subscription conversions (network effect). But Beehiiv's additional revenue streams ($4,873 + $2,358) create the 47% advantage.
- The ease-of-use scores (Substack 9/10, Beehiiv 7/10, Ghost 5/10) are relevant for the platform selection guide - non-technical founders should weight this.
- Read time comparison (Ghost readers spend 23% more time) supports the Ghost recommendation for high-quality, SEO-focused content - it attracts more engaged readers.
